changelog:
Messages tab TX log + 20-message history, check-in button grid, APRS-IS passcode auto-generate, new beacon symbol, and a firmware-update-only mode for the web flasher.

- Messages tab: raised history cap from 10 to 20; outgoing messages (manual send + check-in buttons) are now logged into the same list, tagged TX (RF) / TX (APRS-IS) / TX (RF+IS)
- Check-in buttons: 2x2 grid instead of 4 stacked full-width buttons
- APRS-IS Passcode: added an "Auto Generate" button that derives it from the Callsign field, field stays manually editable
- Beacon Symbol: added "Red Home with L - Rx/Tx iGate/Digi"
- Web Flasher: added a "Firmware update only" install mode that keeps existing settings (writes just the app partition, leaves SPIFFS config untouched), alongside the existing full factory install

## Highlights
- Web config UI: renamed "Received messages" to "Messages" and moved it to right after "Configuration" in the navbar.
- Moved the "Send Message" form to the top of the Messages tab (previously on the Configuration tab).
- Click a callsign in the "From" column of the received-messages list to auto-fill it as the reply target and jump to the message box.
- Added a "Blink LED on new message" toggle (default on) to enable/disable the LED notification for new messages.

See README.md → Changelog for the complete, itemized history.

First versioned release of the 9M2IBR fork (single board: ESP32_9M2IBR_E22_400M22S, ESP32-D + Ebyte E22-400M22S/SX1268).

## Highlights
- Repository baseline set to V1.00; README rewritten to document the actual codebase, with an ongoing Changelog.
- Trimmed to the one board this fork targets; CI updated accordingly.
- Full codebase bug-fix sweep, including a Web Admin auth bypass, a null-pointer crash on `/action`, an unbounded APRS-IS connect loop that could hang boot forever, two stored-XSS holes in the Web UI, and several other correctness fixes (see README Changelog for the full list).
- Software-identifier strings sent over APRS-IS/syslog rebranded from CA2RXU to 9M2IBR (original author copyright/credit retained per GPLv3).
- Added a browser-based Web Flasher published to a public GitHub Pages site: https://g-03355699-tech.github.io/9M2IBR-lora-igate-web-flasher/installer.html

See README.md → Changelog for the complete, itemized history.
